javascript:(function(){var key="__bookmarkletOfDestinyPopup",live=window[key];if(live&&!live.closed){live.focus();return}var pw=Math.min(820,Math.max(620,screen.availWidth*.68)),ph=Math.min(660,Math.max(500,screen.availHeight*.72)),px=Math.max(0,Math.round((screen.availWidth-pw)/2)),py=Math.max(0,Math.round((screen.availHeight-ph)/2)),features="popup=1,width="+Math.round(pw)+",height="+Math.round(ph)+",left="+px+",top="+py+",resizable=1,scrollbars=1,toolbar=0,location=0,menubar=0,status=0",popupName="bookmarkletOfDestiny_"+Date.now()+"_"+Math.random().toString(36).slice(2),w=window.open("about:blank",popupName,features);if(!w)return;try{w.resizeTo(Math.round(pw),Math.round(ph));w.moveTo(px,py)}catch(e){}window[key]=w;try{var p=Fe.getRSBlocks(m,v),u=He();for(let k=0;k<f.length;k+=1){let D=f[k];u.put(D.getMode(),4),u.put(D.getLength(),ae.getLengthInBits(D.getMode(),m)),D.write(u)}let b=0;for(let k=0;k<p.length;k+=1)b+=p[k].dataCount;if(u.getLengthInBits()>b*8)throw"code length overflow. S(u,p)};c.addData=function(m,v){v=v||"Byte";let f=null;switch(v){case"Numeric":f=mt(m);break;case"Alphanumeric":f=ht(m);break;case"Byte":f=gt(m);break;case"Kanji":f=vt(m);break;default:throw"mode:"+v}y.push(f),h=null},c.isDark=function(m,v){if(m<0||s<=m||v<0||s<=v)throw m+","+v;return o[m][v]},c.getModuleCount=function(){return s},c.make=function(){if(i<1){let m=1;for(;m<40;m++){let v=Fe.getRSBlocks(m,n),f=He();for(let u=0;u<y.length;u++){let b=y[u];f.put(b.getMode(),4),f.put(b.getLength(),ae.getLengthInBits(b.getMode(),m)),b.write(f)}let p=0;for(let f=="string"?{text:f}:f||{},f.text=f.text||null,f.id=f.text?f.id||"qrcode-description":null,p=typeof p=="string"?{text:p}:p||{},p.text=p.text||null,p.id=p.text?p.id||"qrcode-title":null;let b=c.getModuleCount()*m+v*2,k,D,O,P,I="",_;for(_="l"+m+",0 0,"+m+" -"+m+",0 0,-"+m+"z ",I+='<svg version="1.1" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"',I+=u.scalable?"":' width="'+b+'px" fill="black"/>',I+="</svg>",I},c.createDataURL=function(m,v){m=m||2,v=typeof v>"u"?m*4:v;let f=c.getModuleCount()*m+v*2,p=v,u=f-v;return Et(f,f,function(b,k){if(p<=b&&b<u&&p<=k&&k<u){let D=Math.floor((b-p)/m),O=Math.floor((k-p)/m);return c.isDark(O,D)?0:1}else return 1})},c.createImgTag=function(m,v,f){m=m||2,v=typeof v>"u"?m*4:v;let p=c.getModuleCount()*m+v*2,u="";return f=0;f<m.length;f+=1){let p=m.charAt(f);switch(p){case"<":v+="&lt;";break;case">":v+="&gt;";break;case"&":v+="&amp;";break;case'"':v+="&quot;";break;default:v+=p;break}}return v},L=function(m){m=typeof m>"u"?2:m;let f=c.getModuleCount()*1+m*2,p=m,u=f-m,b,k,D,O,P,I={"\u2588\u2588":"\u2588","\u2588 ":"\u2580"," \u2588":"\u2584","  ":" "},_={"\u2588\u2588":"\u2580","\u2588 ":"\u2580"," \u2588":" ","  ":" "},G="";for(b=0;b<f;b+=2){for(D=Math.floor((b-p)/1),O=Math.floor((b+1-p)/1),k=0;k<f;k+=1)P="\u2588",p<=k&&k<u&&p<=b&&b<u&&c.isDark(D,Math.floor((k-p)/1))&&(P=" "),p<=k&&k<u&&p<=b+1&&b+1<u&&c.isDark(O,Math.floor((k-p)/1))?P+=" ":P+="\u2588",G+=m<1&&b+1>=u?_[P]:I[P];G+=`%0A`}return f%252&&m>0?G.substring(0,G.length-f-1)+Array(f+1).join("\u2580"):G.substring(0,G.length-1)};return c.createASCII=function(m,v){if(m=m||1,m<2)return L(v);m-=1,v=typeof v>"u"?m*2:v;let f=c.getModuleCount()*m+v*2,p=v,u=f-v,b,k,D,O,P=Array(m+1).join("\u2588\u2588"),I=Array(m+1).join("  "),_="",G="";for(b=0;b<f;b+=1){for(D=Math.floor((b-p)/m),G="",k=0;k<f;k+=1)O=1,p<=k&&k<u&&p<=b&&b<u&&c.isDark(D,Math.floor((k-p)/m))&&(O=0),G+=O?P:I;for(D=0;D<m;D+=1)_+=G+`%0A`}return _.substring(0,_.length-1)},c.renderTo2dContext=function(m,v){v=v||2;let f=c.getModuleCount();for(let p=0;p<f;p++)for(let u=0;u<f;u++)m.fillStyle=c.isDark(p,u)?"black":"white",m.fillRect(u*v,p*v,v,v)},c};se.stringToBytes=function(a){let t=[];for(let e=0;e<a.length;e+=1){let r=a.charCodeAt(e);t.push(r&255)}return t};se.createStringToBytes=function(a,t){let e=(function(){let i=wt(a),n=function(){let h=i.read();if(h==-1)throw"eof";return h},o=0,s={};for(;;){let h=i.read();if(h==-1)break;let y=n(),c=n(),g=n(),E=String.fromCharCode(h<<8|y),x=c<<8|g;s[E]=x,o+=1}if(o!=t)throw o+" != "+t;return s})(),r=63;return function(i){let n=[];for(let o=0;o<i.length;o+=1){let s=i.charCodeAt(o);if(s<128)n.push(s);else{let h=e[i.charAt(o)];typeof h=="number"?(h&255)==h?n.push(h):(n.push(h>>>8),n.push(h&255)):n.push(r)}}return n}};var W={MODE_NUMBER:1,MODE_ALPHA_NUM:2,MODE_8BIT_BYTE:4,MODE_KANJI:8},pe={L:1,M:0,Q:3,H:2},te={PATTERN000:0,PATTERN001:1,PATTERN010:2,PATTERN011:3,PATTERN100:4,PATTERN101:5,PATTERN110:6,PATTERN111:7},ae=(function(){let a=[[],[6,18],[6,22],[6,26],[6,30],[6,34],[6,22,38],[6,24,42],[6,26,46],[6,28,50],[6,30,54],[6,32,58],[6,34,62],[6,26,46,66],[6,26,48,70],[6,26,50,74],[6,30,54,78],[6,30,56,82],[6,30,58,86],[6,34,62,90],[6,28,50,72,94],[6,26,50,74,98],[6,30,54,78,102],[6,28,54,80,106],[6,32,58,84,110],[6,30,58,86,114],[6,34,62,90,118],[6,26,50,74,98,122],[6,30,54,78,102,126],[6,26,52,78,104,130],[6,30,56,82,108,134],[6,34,60,86,112,138],[6,30,58,86,114,142],[6,34,62,90,118,146],[6,30,54,78,102,126,150],[6,24,50,76,102,128,154],[6,28,54,80,106,132,158],[6,32,58,84,110,136,162],[6,26,54,82,110,138,166],[6,30,58,86,114,142,170]],t=1335,e=7973,r=21522,i={},n=function(o){let s=0;for(;o!=0;)s+=1,o>>>=1;return s};return i.getBCHTypeInfo=function(o){let s=o<<10;for(;n(s)-n(t)>=0;)s^=t<<n(s)-n(t);return(o<<10|s)^r},i.getBCHTypeNumber=function(o){let s=o<<12;for(;n(s)-n(e)>=0;)s^=e<<n(s)-n(e);return o<<12|s},i.getPatternPosition=function(o){return a[o-1]},i.getMaskFunction=function(o){switch(o){case te.PATTERN000:return function(s,h){return(s+h)%252==0};case te.PATTERN001:return function(s,h){return s%252==0};case te.PATTERN010:return function(s,h){return h%253==0};case te.PATTERN011:return function(s,h){return(s+h)%253==0};case te.PATTERN100:return function(s,h){return(Math.floor(s/2)+Math.floor(h/3))%252==0};case te.PATTERN101:return function(s,h){return s*h%252+s*h%253==0};case te.PATTERN110:return function(s,h){return(s*h%252+s*h%253)%252==0};case te.PATTERN111:return function(s,h){return(s*h%253+(s+h)%252)%252==0};default:throw"bad maskPattern:"+o}},i.getErrorCorrectPolynomial=function(o){let s=fe([1],0);for(let h=0;h<o;h+=1)s=s.multiply(fe([1,ne.gexp(h)],0));return s},i.getLengthInBits=function(o,s){if(1<=s&&s<10)switch(o){case W.MODE_NUMBER:return 10;case W.MODE_ALPHA_NUM:return 9;case W.MODE_8BIT_BYTE:return 8;case W.MODE_KANJI:return 8;default:throw"mode:"+o}else if(s<27)switch(o){case W.MODE_NUMBER:return 12;case W.MODE_ALPHA_NUM:return 11;case W.MODE_8BIT_BYTE:return 16;case W.MODE_KANJI:return 10;default:throw"mode:"+o}else if(s<41)switch(o){case W.MODE_NUMBER:return 14;case W.MODE_ALPHA_NUM:return 13;case W.MODE_8BIT_BYTE:return 16;case W.MODE_KANJI:return 12;default:throw"mode:"+o}else throw"type:"+s},i.getLostPoint=function(o){let s=o.getModuleCount(),h=0;for(let g=0;g<s;g+=1)for(let E=0;E<s;E+=1){let x=0,C=o.isDark(g,E);for(let T=-1;T<=1;T+=1)if(!(g+T<0||s<=g+T))for(let d=-1;d<=1;d+=1)E+d<0||s<=E+d||T==0&&d==0||C==o.isDark(g+T,E+d)&&(x+=1);x>5&&(h+=3+x-5)}for(let g=0;g<s-1;g+=1)for(let E=0;E<s-1;E+=1){let x=0;o.isDark(g,E)&&(x+=1),o.isDark(g+1,E)&&(x+=1),o.isDark(g,E+1)&&(x+=1),o.isDark(g+1,E+1)&&(x+=1),(x==0||x==4)&&(h+=3)}for(let g=0;g<s;g+=1)for(let E=0;E<s-6;E+=1)o.isDark(g,E)&&!o.isDark(g,E+1)&&o.isDark(g,E+2)&&o.isDark(g,E+3)&&o.isDark(g,E+4)&&!o.isDark(g,E+5)&&o.isDark(g,E+6)&&(h+=40);for(let g=0;g<s;g+=1)for(let E=0;E<s-6;E+=1)o.isDark(E,g)&&!o.isDark(E+1,g)&&o.isDark(E+2,g)&&o.isDark(E+3,g)&&o.isDark(E+4,g)&&!o.isDark(E+5,g)&&o.isDark(E+6,g)&&(h+=40);let y=0;for(let g=0;g<s;g+=1)for(let E=0;E<s;E+=1)o.isDark(E,g)&&(y+=1);let c=Math.abs(100*y/s/s-50)/5;return h+=c*10,h},i})(),ne=(function(){let a=new Array(256),t=new Array(256);for(let r=0;r<8;r+=1)a[r]=1<<r;for(let t={sin:Math.sin,cos:Math.cos,tan:Math.tan,sqrt:Math.sqrt,abs:Math.abs,log:Math.log,ln:Math.log,floor:Math.floor,ceil:Math.ceil,round:Math.round},e=[],r=a.trim(),i=/\s*(?:(\d+(?:\.\d*)?|\.\d+)|([A-Za-z]+)|([()+\-*/%25^]))/gy,n=0,o;for(;n<r.length;){if(i.lastIndex=n,o=i.exec(r),!o)throw new Error(`Unexpected token at ${n+1}`);e.push(o[1]?{type:"number",value:Number(o[1])}:o[2]?{type:"name",value:o[2].toLowerCase()}:{type:o[3],value:o[3]}),n=i.lastIndex}let s=0,h=d=>e[s]?.type===d,y=d=>{if(!h(d))throw new Error(`Expected ${d}`);return e[s++]},c=()=>{if(h("number"))return y("number").value;if(h("(")){y("(");let d=C();return y(")"),d}if(h("name")){let d=y("name").value;if(d==="pi")return Math.PI;if(d==="e")return Math.E;if(!t[d])throw new Error(`Unknown function: ${d}`);y("(");let A=C();return y(")"),t[d](A)}throw new Error("Expected a number")},g=()=>h("+")?(y("+"),g()):h("-")?(y("-"),-g()):c(),E=()=>{let d=g();return h("^")?(y("^"),d**E()):d},x=()=>{let d=E();for(;h("*")||h("/")||h("%25");){let A=e[s++].type,w=E();d=A==="*"?d*w:A==="/"?d/w:d%25w}return d},C=()=>{let d=x();for(;h("+")||h("-");){let A=e[s++].type,w=x();d=A==="+"?d+w:d-w}return d};if(!e.length)throw new Error("Enter an expression");let T=C();if(s!==e.length)throw new Error("Unexpected input");return T}function It(a){U(a,Y("SCIENTIFIC CALCULATOR","Keyboard-ready expressions with local history.",`<div v=y(new Date);return r==="active"?!m.done:r==="completed"?m.done:r==="overdue"?!m.done&&m.dueDate&&m.dueDate<v:r==="today"?m.dueDate===v:r==="upcoming"?!m.done&&m.dueDate>v:!0},A=()=>{let Set(u.map(D=>D.id));return p.forEach(D=>D.tagIds=D.tagIds.filter(O=>k.has(O))),{notes:p,tags:u,todos:b}},L=async m=>{let v=l("%23importOrganizerFile").files[0];if(!v)return l("%23importStatus").textContent="SELECT A JSON BACKUP FIRST.";try{if(!(v.type==="application/json"||v.name.toLowerCase().endsWith(".json")))throw new Error("Choose a JSON backup file");if(v.size>5*1024*1024)throw new Error("Backup exceeds the 5 MB limit");let f=$(JSON.parse(await v.text()));if(m&&!confirm("Replace all current notes, tags, and tasks with this backup?"))return;if(m)R.data.notesV2=f.notes,R.data.noteTags=f.tags,R.data.todos=f.todos;else{let p=new Map;f.tags.forEach(u=>{let k=R.data.noteTags.some(D=>D.id===u.id)?crypto.randomUUID():u.id;p.set(u.id,k),R.data.noteTags.push({...u,id:k})}}),f.notes.forEach(u=>R.data.notesV2.push({...u,id:R.data.notesV2.some(b=>b.id===u.id)?crypto.randomUUID():u.id,tagIds:u.tagIds.map(b=>p.get(b)).filter(Boolean)})),f.todos.forEach(u=>R.data.todos.push({...u,id:R.data.todos.some(b=>b.id===u.id)?crypto.randomUUID():u.id}))}e=null,c(),S(),l("%23importStatus").textContent=`${m?"REPLACED":"MERGED"} class="row" style="justify-content:center;margin-top:14px"><button id="timeStart" class="primary">START</button><button id="timeReset">RESET</button></div></div>%0A    <div class="card"><h3>Timer t=l("%23timeDisplay"),e=()=>{let n=N.timer.mode==="stopwatch";t.textContent=Dt(n?N.stopwatch.elapsed:N.timer.remaining),l("%23timeStart").textContent=(n?N.stopwatch.running:N.timer.running)?"PAUSE":"START",F("[data-mode]").forEach(o=>o.classList.toggle("active",o.dataset.mode===N.timer.mode))};F("[data-mode]").forEach(n=>n.onclick=()=>{N.timer.mode=n.dataset.mode,N.timer.mode==="pomodoro"&&(N.timer.remaining=N.timer.pomodoroWork?1500:300,N.timer.initial=N.timer.remaining,N.timer.running=!1),e()}),l("%23timeStart").onclick=()=>N.timer.mode==="stopwatch"?N.stopwatch.running=!N.stopwatch.running:N.timer.running=!N.timer.running,l("%23timeReset").onclick=()=>{N.timer.running=!1,N.stopwatch.running=!1,N.stopwatch.elapsed=0,N.timer.remaining=N.timer.initial,e()},l("%23timerSet").onclick=()=>{let n=Math.max(60,Number(l("%23timerMinutes").value)*60);N.timer.remaining=N.timer.initial=n,N.timer.mode="timer",N.timer.running=!1,e()},l("%23alarmSet").onclick=()=>{N.alarm=l("%23alarmTime").value,l("%23alarmStatus").textContent=N.alarm?`Alarm armed for ${N.alarm}`:"Choose a time."};let r=performance.now(),i=setInterval(()=>{let n=performance.now(),o=(n-r)/1e3;r=n,N.stopwatch.running&&(N.stopwatch.elapsed+=o),N.timer.running&&(N.timer.remaining-=o,N.timer.remaining<=0&&(N.timer.running=!1,N.timer.remaining=0,j(N.timer.mode==="pomodoro"?"Pomodoro cycle complete":"Timer complete"),N.timer.mode==="pomodoro"&&(N.timer.pomodoroWork=!N.timer.pomodoroWork,N.timer.remaining=N.timer.initial=N.timer.pomodoroWork?1500:300))),N.alarm&&new Date().toTimeString().slice(0,5)===N.alarm&&(j(`Alarm: ${N.alarm}`),N.alarm=null,l("%23alarmStatus").textContent="Alarm completed."),e()},100);N.cleanup.push(()=>clearInterval(i)),e()}var it=864e5,Ut=a=>({year:a.getFullYear(),month:a.getMonth()+1,day:a.getDate()}),q=({year:a,month:t,day:e})=>Date.UTC(a,t-1,e)/it,ve=(a,t)=>new Date(a,t,0).getDate(),rt=({year:a,month:t,day:e})=>Number.isInteger(a)&&a>=1&&a<=9999&&Number.isInteger(t)&&t>=1&&t<=12&&Number.isInteger(e)&&e>=1&&e<=ve(a,t),le=a=>{let t=/^(\d{4})-(\d{2})-(\d{2})$/.exec(String(a||""));if(!t)return null;let e={year:Number(t[1]),month:Number(t[2]),day:Number(t[3])};return rt(e)?e:null},_t=a=>{let t=new Date(a*it);return{year:t.getUTCFullYear(),month:t.getUTCMonth()+1,day:t.getUTCDate()}},_e=a=>`${String(a.year).padStart(4,"0")}-${String(a.month).padStart(2,"0")}-${String(a.day).padStart(2,"0")}`,Ve=a=>new Date(a.year,a.month-1,a.day).toLocaleDateString(void 0,{year:"numeric",month:"long",day:"numeric"}),ye=(a,t)=>Math.sign(q(a)-q(t)),Me=(a,t)=>{let e=a.year*12+a.month-1+t,r=Math.floor(e/12),i=e-r*12+1;return{year:r,month:i,day:Math.min(a.day,ve(r,i))}},we=(a,t)=>({year:a.year+t,month:a.month,day:Math.min(a.day,ve(a.year+t,a.month))}),Bt=()=>le(window.__BOD_TEST_TODAY__)||Ut(new Date);function Ft(a){let t=Bt(),e={year:t.year,month:t.month};U(a,Y("CALENDAR & DATE TOOLS","Browse months and calculate with local calendar dates.",`<div class="grid">%0A    <div class="card full id="calendarToday">TODAY</button><button id="calendarNext" aria-label="Next month">NEXT \u2192</button></div></div>%0A      <div class="calendar-weekdays" class="output" id="addResult">Use a negative number to subtract.</div></div></div>%0A    <div class="card full"><h3>Age calculator</h3><div class="split"><label>Birth date<input type="date" id="birthDate"></label><label>Age on date<input type="date" id="ageOnDate" value="${_e(t)}"></label></div><button id="ageCalculate" style="margin-top:10px">CALCULATE AGE</button><div class="output" id="ageResult" style="margin-top:10px">Choose a birth date.</div></div>%0A  </div>`));let r=()=>{let n=new Date(e.year,e.month-1,1).getDay(),o=ve(e.year,e.month);l("%23calendarTitle").textContent=new role="gridcell"></span>';let g=e.year===t.year&&e.month===t.month&&c===t.day;return`<span class="calendar-day${g?" today":""}" role="gridcell" n=le(l("%23daysStart").value),o=le(l("%23daysEnd").value);if(!n||!o)return l("%23daysResult").textContent="ERR: Choose two valid dates.";let s=q(o)-q(n);l("%23daysResult").textContent=`SIGNED: ${s} DAY${Math.abs(s)===1?"":"S"} \xB7 ABSOLUTE: ${Math.abs(s)} DAY${Math.abs(s)===1?"":"S"}`},l("%23addCalculate").onclick=()=>{let n=le(l("%23addDate").value),o=Number(l("%23addDays").value);if(!n)return s=_t(q(n)+o);l("%23addResult").textContent=`${Ve(s)} \xB7 ${_e(s)}`},l("%23ageCalculate").onclick=()=>{let n=le(l("%23birthDate").value),o=le(l("%23ageOnDate").value);if(!n||!o)return l("%23ageResult").textContent="ERR: Choose valid birth and comparison dates.";if(ye(n,o)>0)return l("%23ageResult").textContent="ERR: Birth date cannot be after the comparison date.";let s=o.year-n.year;ye(o,we(n,s))<0&&s--;let h=we(n,s),y=0;for(;ye(Me(h,y+1),o)<=0;)y++;let c=Me(h,y),g=q(o)-q(c),E=we(n,o.year-n.year);ye(E,o)<0&&(E=we(n,o.year-n.year+1));let x=q(E)-q(o);l("%23ageResult").textContent=`${s} YEARS \xB7 ${y} MONTHS \xB7 ${g} DAYS \xB7 NEXT BIRTHDAY IN ${x} DAY${x===1?"":"S"}`},window.render_calendar_to_text=()=>JSON.stringify({view:e,today:t,firstWeekday:new Date(e.year,e.month-1,1).getDay(),days:ve(e.year,e.month)}),N.cleanup.push(()=>{delete e=Ke(a),r=Ke(t);return(Math.max(e,r)+.05)/(Math.min(e,r)+.05)},$e=a=>Ce(a,{r:255,g:255,b:255})>=Ce(a,{r:0,g:0,b:0})?"%23FFFFFF":"%23000000",Ee=(a,t,e)=>({r:V(a.r+(t.r-a.r)*e),g:V(a.g+(t.g-a.g)*e),b:V(a.b+(t.b-a.b)*e),a:a.a??1}),qe=(a,t)=>{let x(T=h){h=T;let d=T==="from"?i:n,A=T==="from"?n:i,w=T==="from"?e.value:r.value,S=T==="from"?r.value:e.value;if(d.value.trim()===""){A.value="";return}let M=g(Number(d.value),w,S);A.value=Number.isFinite(M)?E(M):""}o.oninput=()=>{let T=Number(o.value);Number.isFinite(T)&&T>0&&(R.data.settings.usdInrRate=T,R.data.settings.usdInrManual=!0,R.save(),Z="idle"),oe(),x(h)},l("%23refreshCurrencyRate").onclick=()=>Ue({force:!0});let C=()=>{o.value=R.data.settings.usdInrRate,oe(),x(h)};ke=C,N.cleanup.push(()=>{ke===C&&(ke=()=>{})}),t.oninput=y,e.oninput=()=>x(h),r.oninput=()=>x(h),i.oninput=()=>x("from"),n.oninput=()=>x("to"),y(),oe()}function Xt(a){U(a,Y("TEXT LAB","Transform, inspect, encode, and format text.",`<div class="grid"><div class="card full"><textarea id="textInput" placeholder="Paste text here..."></textarea><div class="row wrap" style="margin-top:8px">%0A    <button data-text="upper">UPPERCASE</button><button data-text="lower">lowercase</button><button data-text="title">Title Case</button><button data-text="b64e">BASE64 ENCODE</button><button data-text="b64d">BASE64 DECODE</button><button data-text="urle">URL ENCODE</button><button data-text="urld">URL DECODE</button><button data-text="json">FORMAT JSON</button><button data-text="copy">COPY</button></div></div>%0A    <div class="card full"><h3>Statistics</h3><div class="stat-grid"><div class="stat"><b id="chars">0</b>CHARS</div><div t=l("%23textInput"),e=()=>{l("%23chars").textContent=t.value.length,l("%23words").textContent=t.value.trim()?t.value.trim().split(/\s+/).length:0,l("%23lines").textContent=t.value?t.value.split(`%0A`).length:0,l("%23bytes").textContent=new TextEncoder().encode(t.value).length};t.oninput=e,F("[data-text]").forEach(r=>r.onclick=async()=>{try{let i=r.dataset.text,n=t.value;i==="upper"&&(t.value=n.toUpperCase()),i==="lower"&&(t.value=n.toLowerCase()),i==="title"&&(t.value=n.toLowerCase().replace(/\b\w/g,o=>o.toUpperCase())),i==="b64e"&&(t.value=btoa(unescape(encodeURIComponent(n)))),i==="b64d"&&(t.value=decodeURIComponent(escape(atob(n)))),i==="urle"&&(t.value=encodeURIComponent(n)),i==="urld"&&(t.value=decodeURIComponent(n)),i==="json"&&(t.value=JSON.stringify(JSON.parse(n),null,2)),i==="copy"&&(await navigator.clipboard.writeText(n),j("Text copied")),e()}catch(i){j(`Error: ${i.message}`)}}),e()}var Qt=a=>[...new Uint8Array(a)].map(t=>t.toString(16).padStart(2,"0")).join(""),ea=async(a,t)=>Qt(await crypto.subtle.digest(t,a)),Xe=a=>{if(!/^[A-Za-z0-9_-]*={0,2}$/.test(a))throw new Error("Invalid Base64URL data");let t=a.replaceAll("-","+").replaceAll("_","/"),e=t+"=".repeat((4-t.length%254)%254);return new TextDecoder().decode(Uint8Array.from(atob(e),r=>r.charCodeAt(0)))},dt=a=>{let t=a.trim();return/^(https?:|mailto:|tel:|%23|\/)/i.test(t)?t:""},xe=a=>{let t=[],e=i=>`\0${t.push(i)-1}\0`,r=String(a).replace(/`([^`\n]+)`/g,(i,n)=>e(`<code>${B(n)}</code>`)).replace(/\[([^\]\n]+)\]\(([^)\s]+)\)/g,(i,n,o)=>{let s=dt(o);return s?e(`<a href="${B(s)}" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">${B(n)}</a>`):n});return B(r).replace(/\*\*([^*\n]+)\*\*/g,"<strong>$1</strong>").replace(/__([^_\n]+)__/g,"<strong>$1</strong>").replace(/(^|[^\w])\*([^*\n]+)\*/g,"$1<em>$2</em>").replace(/(^|[^\w])_([^_\n]+)_/g,"$1<em>$2</em>").replace(/~~([^~\n]+)~~/g,"<del>$1</del>").replace(/\u0000(\d+)\u0000/g,(i,n)=>t[Number(n)]||"")},ut=a=>{let t=String(a).replace(/\r\n?/g,`%0A`).split(`%0A`),e=[],r=[],i=null,n=null,o=()=>{r.length&&e.push(`<p>${xe(r.join(" "))}</p>`),r=[]},s=()=>{i&&e.push(`<${i.type}>${i.items.map(y=>`<li>${xe(y)}</li>`).join("")}</${i.type}>`),i=null},h=()=>{n&&e.push(`<pre><code>${B(n.lines.join(`%0A`))}</code></pre>`),n=null};for(let y of t){if(n){/^```/.test(y)?h():n.lines.push(y);continue}if(/^```/.test(y)){o(),s(),n={lines:[]};continue}if(!y.trim()){o(),s();continue}let c=y.match(/^(%23{1,6})\s+(.+)$/);if(c){o(),s(),e.push(`<h${c[1].length}>${xe(c[2])}</h${c[1].length}>`);continue}let g=y.match(/^>\s?(.*)$/);if(g){o(),s(),e.push(`<blockquote>${xe(g[1])}</blockquote>`);continue}let E=y.match(/^\s*[-+*]\s+(.+)$/),x=y.match(/^\s*\d+[.)]\s+(.+)$/);if(E||x){o();let C=x?"ol":"ul",T=(x||E)[1];i&&i.type!==C&&s(),i||(i={type:C,items:[]}),i.items.push(T);continue}s(),r.push(y.trim())}return o(),s(),h(),e.join("")},ta=a=>String(a).replace(/@import[\s\S]*?(?:;|$)/gi,"/* import removed */").replace(/url\s*\([^)]*\)/gi,"none").replace(/expression\s*\([^)]*\)/gi,"none").replace(/behavior\s*:[^;}]*/gi,""),aa=new Set(["A","ABBR","ARTICLE","ASIDE","B","BLOCKQUOTE","BR","BUTTON","CODE","DIV","EM","FOOTER","H1","H2","H3","H4","H5","H6","HEADER","HR","I","KBD","LABEL","LI","MAIN","MARK","NAV","OL","P","PRE","SECTION","SMALL","SPAN","STRONG","SUB","SUP","TABLE","TBODY","TD","TFOOT","TH","THEAD","TR","U","UL"]),na=a=>{let t=new o=document.createElement(i.tagName.toLowerCase());for(let s of i.attributes){let h=s.name.toLowerCase();if((["class","id","title","aria-label"].includes(h)||h.startsWith("data-"))&&o.setAttribute(h,s.value),i.tagName==="A"&&h==="href"){let y=dt(s.value);y&&(o.setAttribute("href",y),o.setAttribute("target","_blank"),o.setAttribute("rel","noopener noreferrer"))}}n.append(o),[...i.childNodes].forEach(s=>r(s,o))};return[...t.body.firstElementChild.childNodes].forEach(i=>r(i,e)),e};function oa(a){U(a,Y("DEVELOPER TOOLS","Inspect and transform code UNTRUSTED`}catch(c){r.jwt={error:c.message},l("%23jwtHeader").textContent=`ERROR: ${c.message}`,l("%23jwtPayload").textContent="Payload unavailable.",l("%23jwtMeta").textContent="Token was not la(a){let t=!!Ge();U(a,Y("PAGE CONTROLS","Modify the page that launched the dashboard.",`<div class="grid"><div class="card full"><h3>Target status</h3><div class="output">${t?"OPENER CONNECTED \u2014 FILTER</button></div>%0A    <div class="card third"><h3>Dark mode</h3><p class="muted">Apply a readable dark theme while keeping images and videos unchanged.</p><button data-effect="dark">TOGGLE DARK MODE</button></div>%0A    <div class="card"><h3>Remove overlays</h3><p class="muted">Remove likely fixed dialogs and blockers. u=0;u<9;u++)o.push({x:90+u*58,y:55+p*38,w:28,h:20,alive:!0});T=1},w=()=>{i.clear(),n={x:335,y:397,w:32,h:18,cooldown:0},s=[],h=[],y=0,c=3,g=1,E="playing",d=0,A(),L()},S=()=>{n.cooldown<=0&&E==="playing"&&(s.push({x:n.x+16,y:n.y,vy:-420}),n.cooldown=.28)},M=(p,u)=>p.x<u.x+u.w&&p.x+(p.w||3)>u.x&&p.y<u.y+u.h&&p.y+(p.h||8)>u.y,$=p=>{if(E!=="playing")return;let ba(a){U(a,Y("SETTINGS","Customize visuals and manage local data.",`<div class="grid"><div class="card"><h3>Matrix display</h3><label class="item"><input id="rainSetting" type="checkbox" class="card"><h3>Data</h3><p class="muted">Data is stored only for this website origin. Reset permanently deletes notes, tasks, history, settings, and scores.</p><button id="resetData" class="danger">RESET ALL LOCAL DATA</button></div>%0A    <div class="card full"><h3>Storage identity</h3><div class="output">${B(location.origin==="null"?"opaque preview origin":location.origin)}<br>KEY: ${Pe}</div></div></div>`)),l("%23rainSetting").onchange=t=>R.update("settings.rain",t.target.checked),l("%23densitySetting").oninput=t=>R.update("settings.density",Number(t.target.value)),l("%23accentSetting").oninput=t=>{R.update("settings.accent",t.target.value),X.style.setProperty("--green",t.target.value)},l("%23resetData").onclick=pt}function pt(){confirm("Delete all Bookmarklet of Destiny data saved on this site?")&&(R.reset(),j("Local data reset"),Re("home"))}function Ea(a){U(a,Y("HELP & SHORTCUTS","Operational notes for the dashboard.",`<div class="grid"><div class="card"><h3>Global controls</h3><div class="list"><div class="item"><kbd>Ctrl/\u2318 K</kbd><span>Command palette</span></div><div class="item"><kbd>Esc</kbd><span>Close palette / exit fullscreen</span></div><div class="item"><kbd>F</kbd><span>Fullscreen active canvas game</span></div></div></div>%0A    <div class="card"><h3>Game controls</h3><div class="list"><div class="item"><kbd>WASD / Arrows</kbd><span>Snake, 2048, Pong, Tron, Breakout, Invaders</span></div><div class="item"><kbd>Space / P</kbd><span>Pause or shoot where shown</span></div><div class="item"><kbd>Q / E / Enter / Shift</kbd><span>Two-player Minesweeper open and flag</span></div><div class="item"><kbd>Right click</kbd><span>Flag a Minesweeper cell</span></div></div></div>%0A    <div class="card full"><h3>Expanded Arcade</h3><p class="muted">Ten offline games include Breakout, Connect Four, Tron, Space Invaders, and Memory Match. Snake and Minesweeper now include local two-player battle modes alongside Tic-Tac-Toe and Pong.</p></div>%0A    <div class="card full"><h3>Calendar tools</h3><p class="muted">Browse a Sunday-first monthly calendar, compare dates, add or subtract whole days, and calculate age using local calendar dates.</p></div>%0A    <div class="card full"><h3>World Clock</h3><p class="muted">Save live IANA time zones and convert a chosen local date and time with daylight-saving gap and overlap detection.</p></div>%0A    <div class="card full"><h3>Color Tools</h3><p class="muted">Convert HEX, RGB, and HSL; generate palettes; check WCAG contrast; and preview approximate color-vision simulations.</p></div>%0A    <div class="card full"><h3>Developer Tools</h3><p class="muted">Test regular expressions, generate secure hashes, inspect JWT data, preview safe Markdown, and experiment with sanitized HTML and CSS.</p></div>%0A    <div class="card full"><h3>Notes & Tasks</h3><p class="muted">Create searchable Markdown notes with tags, pins, archive and trash, plus prioritized tasks with local due dates and JSON backup.</p></div>%0A    <div class="card full"><h3>Browser limitations</h3><p class="muted">Chrome blocks bookmarklets on protected pages including <code>chrome://</code>, the New Tab page, extension pages, and the Chrome Web Store. On ordinary sites, the dashboard opens in a separate resizable popup window.</p></div>%0A    <div class="card full"><h3>Privacy</h3><p class="muted">Only the optional USD/INR updater contacts the fixed Frankfurter exchange-rate endpoint. All other tools load no external assets and use no analytics or accounts. Notes, tasks, settings, history, rates, and scores stay in local storage belonging to the page where the bookmarklet launched.</p></div></div>`))}R.load();Nt();Rt();J?.ready?.();})();%0A})(w,d,w.localStorage,w.location,w.navigator,w.crypto,w.TextEncoder,w.performance,w.devicePixelRatio,w.innerWidth,w.innerHeight,w.requestAnimationFrame.bind(w),w.cancelAnimationFrame.bind(w),w.addEventListener.bind(w),w.removeEventListener.bind(w),w.getComputedStyle.bind(w),w.confirm.bind(w),w.parent,w.ResizeObserver)}finally{delete window.__BOD_BOOTSTRAP__}w.focus()}catch(error){try{w.close()}catch(e){}delete window[key];console.error(error)}})()
